introSection: Seifenkiste is a kiddie roller coaster currently located at BergTierPark Blindham in 	Aying, Bavaria, Germany. It was the last Gerstlauer Kiddy Racer ever produced.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The car is designed to resemble a soapbox race car.

fullText:
Seifenkiste is a kiddie roller coaster currently located at BergTierPark Blindham in 	Aying, Bavaria, Germany. It was the last Gerstlauer Kiddy Racer ever produced.



Red track and yellow supports.

The car is designed to resemble a soapbox race car.
